View - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view
This class is the abstract class that represents the view of the game.
View(ViewState) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
Constructor.
ViewState - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view
Enumerates the possible states of the view.
virtualServer - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
The virtual server.
VirtualServer - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver
This interface is used to define the methods that the VirtualServer must implement.
VirtualView - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview
the VirtualView Interface exposes to the player the methods that the controller is able to call on the client's actual View, without knowing with which connection protocol said client is connected.
